title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Job Description

We are hiring an experienced DevOps Engineer to support and enhance enterprise-grade CI/CD pipelines and cloud-native platforms. The ideal candidate will have strong hands-on expertise in DevOps tooling, containerization, Kubernetes, and cloud environments, with exposure to governance, security, and automation.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, build, and support end-to-end CI/CD pipelines as a centralised DevOps solution
  • Orchestrate pipelines using tools such as Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, or equivalent
  • Manage source control, build, test, and deployment processes across multiple environments
  • Containerise applications and manage deployments using Kubernetes
  • Implement DevOps governance, security standards, and audit requirements
  • Support hybrid cloud and on-premise infrastructure environments
  • Collaborate with development, QA, and security teams to enable continuous delivery and testing
  • Maintain observability platforms and support incident response workflows
  • Strong hands-on experience with CI/CD tools such as Bitbucket, Jenkins, Artifactory, SonarQube, Veracode (SAST), JIRA, and Confluence
  • Proven experience in Kubernetes deployment, pod/container creation, and secret management
  • Experience with OpenShift and/or AWS cloud platforms
  • Solid understanding of build and branching strategies
  • Hands-on experience with Shell and/or Groovy scripting
  • Experience in customising JIRA workflows and setting up Confluence spaces
  • Prior experience implementing CI/CD pipelines across internal and external cloud environments
  • Experience with continuous testing tools such as JUnit, SonarQube, and Veracode
  • Exposure to automation using Python, Chef, Ruby, or PowerShell
  • Experience managing hybrid cloud and on-premise environments
  • Familiarity with observability tools and incident management processes

Nice to Have

Working knowledge of AI / Machine Learning applications

Exposure to Big Data platforms such as Hadoop, Cloudera, or Elasticsearch

postedCompany.description: Singha Tech Solutions, a leading technology consulting firm, was founded in 2024 in Singapore following the strategic acquisition of GoGlobal Systems Singapore, which established our headquarters in this vibrant global technology hub. From the outset, our mission has been to empower organisations worldwide through innovative, intelligent technology solutions that drive transformation and sustainable growth.
